audience: English-speaking visitors who want to understand or change cookie preferences on the VisualVibe website
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Begrijpen welke cookies VisualVibe gebruikt en toestemming voor analytische cookies beheren of intrekken

searchIntent.question: Which cookies does VisualVibe use and how can I manage consent?
searchIntent.geographicContext: Belgium and the European Economic Area

directAnswer: VisualVibe uses essential administrator security cookies and enables Google Analytics cookies only after a visitor accepts them; consent can be changed or withdrawn at any time.
title: Cookie policy | VisualVibe
metaDescription: See which essential and analytics cookies VisualVibe uses, how Google Analytics depends on your consent and how to change your preferences.
factsToPreserve: Regular visitors do not receive administrator session cookies
Analytics cookies remain disabled until consent
Google Consent Mode governs analytics consent
No analytics data is used for advertising or profiling
YouTube, Google Maps and Matterport are named third-party embeds
Visitors may change or withdraw consent at any time
